tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating poor long-term glycemic control, and mildly low fasting glucose, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or glucose variability. Creatinine is elevated, raising concern for possible renal impairment. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and diabetes management.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
